query:
INSERT INTO `products` (`title`, `artist`, `price`, `category`, `description`, `images`, `featured`, `stock`) VALUES
('Abstract Serenity', 'Elena Rodriguez', 2500.00, 'Paintings', 'A mesmerizing abstract piece capturing the essence of tranquility through bold brushstrokes and vibrant colors.', JSON_ARRAY('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1579783902614-e3fb5141b0cb?w=500&h=500&fit=crop'), 1, 5),
('Ethereal Dreams', 'Marcus Chen', 3200.00, 'Paintings', 'Contemporary painting exploring the intersection of reality and imagination with layered textures.', JSON_ARRAY('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1561214115-6d2f1b0609fa?w=500&h=500&fit=crop'), 1, 3),
('Urban Pulse', 'Sofia BergstrĂ¶m', 1800.00, 'Photography', 'Stunning urban landscape capturing the energy of modern city life through innovative composition.', JSON_ARRAY('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1578321272176-b7bff2e4e5e7?w=500&h=500&fit=crop'), 1, 8),
('Timeless Form', 'David Okafor', 4500.00, 'Sculptures', 'Bronze sculpture representing the eternal nature of human connection and movement.', JSON_ARRAY('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1578926078328-123456789012?w=500&h=500&fit=crop'), 1, 2),
('Digital Horizons', 'Alex Kumar', 1200.00, 'Digital', 'Cutting-edge digital art exploring the boundaries between technology and human emotion.', JSON_ARRAY('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1579783902614-e3fb5141b0cb?w=500&h=500&fit=crop'), 0, 10),
('Chromatic Waves', 'Isabella Rossi', 2800.00, 'Paintings', 'Oil painting featuring dynamic color waves that seem to flow across the canvas with movement.', JSON_ARRAY('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1561214115-6d2f1b0609fa?w=500&h=500&fit=crop'), 0, 4),
('Midnight City', 'James Wilson', 1600.00, 'Photography', 'Atmospheric night photography capturing the solitude and beauty of urban environments.', JSON_ARRAY('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1578926078328-123456789012?w=500&h=500&fit=crop'), 0, 6),
('Sculptural Poetry', 'Amara Osei', 3800.00, 'Sculptures', 'Contemporary sculpture blending traditional techniques with modern aesthetics.', JSON_ARRAY('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1579783902614-e3fb5141b0cb?w=500&h=500&fit=crop'), 0, 3),
('Neon Reflections', 'Viktor Petrov', 2100.00, 'Digital', 'Digital artwork exploring neon aesthetics and retro-futuristic themes.', JSON_ARRAY('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1561214115-6d2f1b0609fa?w=500&h=500&fit=crop'), 0, 7),
('Organic Geometry', 'Yuki Tanaka', 2400.00, 'Paintings', 'Acrylic painting combining organic forms with geometric precision.', JSON_ARRAY('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1578926078328-123456789012?w=500&h=500&fit=crop'), 0, 5),
('Luminous Paths', 'Carlos Mendez', 1900.00, 'Photography', 'Landscape photography capturing the interplay of light and shadow in natural environments.', JSON_ARRAY('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1579783902614-e3fb5141b0cb?w=500&h=500&fit=crop'), 0, 9),
('Kinetic Energy', 'Priya Sharma', 3100.00, 'Sculptures', 'Dynamic sculpture exploring movement and balance through innovative materials.', JSON_ARRAY('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1561214115-6d2f1b0609fa?w=500&h=500&fit=crop'), 0, 2);
